---
title: "DEGgo RNA-seq Report"
author: "DEGgo"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
params:
  results: NULL
  sig_deg: NULL
  go_results: NULL
  summary: NULL
  output_dir: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

res <- params$results
outdir <- params$output_dir

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

html_card <- function(title, value, subtitle = NULL) {
  cat(
    '<div class="card" style="padding:16px;margin:8px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #ddd;">',
    '<h3 style="margin-top:0;">', title, '</h3>',
    '<div style="font-size:28px;font-weight:bold;">', value, '</div>',
    if (!is.null(subtitle)) paste0('<p style="color:#666;">', subtitle, '</p>') else '',
    '</div>'
  )
}

show_table <- function(x, n = 30) {
  x <- as.data.frame(x)
  if (nrow(x) == 0) {
    cat("<p><em>No data available.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  if (is.finite(n)) x <- head(x, n)
  print(knitr::kable(x, format = "html", table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover'"))
}

find_png <- function(path) {
  if (!dir.exists(path)) return(character())
  list.files(path, pattern = "\\.png$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
}

emit_gallery <- function(files, width = "95%") {
  if (length(files) == 0) {
    cat("<p><em>No plot found.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  for (f in files) {
    title <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(f))
    f <- normalizePath(f, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)

    cat('<div class="card" style="padding:16px;margin:18px 0;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #ddd;">')
    cat('<h3>', title, '</h3>')
    cat('<img src="', f, '" style="width:', width, ';border:1px solid #eee;border-radius:8px;">')
    cat('</div>')
  }
}

clean_go <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(data.frame())
  if (!is.null(x$go_results)) x <- x$go_results
  tryCatch(as.data.frame(x), error = function(e) data.frame())
}

sig <- params$sig_deg %||% res$sig_deg
go  <- params$go_results %||% res$go_results
sumtab <- params$summary %||% res$summary
```

<style>
body {
  font-size: 14px;
}
h1, h2, h3 {
  font-weight: 700;
}
.card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 12px;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .card-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }
}
</style>

# Overview

```{r overview, results='asis'}
cat('<div class="card-grid">')

html_card("Analysis mode", res$run_params$analysis_mode %||% "NA")
html_card("Method", res$run_params$method %||% "NA")
html_card("Organism", res$run_params$organism %||% "NA")
html_card("DEGgo version", res$version %||% "development")

cat('</div>')

cat("<br>")
cat("<strong>Output directory:</strong><br>")
cat("<code>", outdir, "</code>")
```

# Run parameters

```{r run-params}
if (!is.null(res$run_params)) {
  show_table(as.data.frame(res$run_params), n = Inf)
}
```

# Sample metadata

```{r metadata}
if (!is.null(res$metadata)) {
  show_table(res$metadata, n = 100)
}
```

# Differential expression summary

```{r deg-summary}
if (!is.null(sumtab)) {
  show_table(sumtab, n = Inf)
}
```

# PCA plots {.tabset}

## PCA gallery

```{r pca-plots, results='asis'}
pca_dirs <- c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_PCA"),
  file.path(outdir, "PCA"),
  file.path(outdir, "pca")
)

pca_dir <- pca_dirs[dir.exists(pca_dirs)][1]
pca_files <- find_png(pca_dir)

emit_gallery(pca_files)
```

# Volcano plots {.tabset}

## Volcano gallery

```{r volcano-plots, results='asis'}
volcano_dirs <- c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_volcano"),
  file.path(outdir, "volcano"),
  file.path(outdir, "Volcano")
)

volcano_dir <- volcano_dirs[dir.exists(volcano_dirs)][1]
volcano_files <- find_png(volcano_dir)

emit_gallery(volcano_files)
```

# Heatmaps {.tabset}

## Heatmap gallery

```{r heatmap-plots, results='asis'}
heatmap_dirs <- c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_heatmaps"),
  file.path(outdir, "heatmaps"),
  file.path(outdir, "Heatmaps")
)

heatmap_dir <- heatmap_dirs[dir.exists(heatmap_dirs)][1]
heatmap_files <- find_png(heatmap_dir)

emit_gallery(heatmap_files)
```

# Significant DEGs {.tabset}

```{r sig-deg-tabs, results='asis'}
if (is.null(sig)) {

  cat("<p><em>No significant DEG table available.</em></p>")

} else if (is.list(sig)) {

  for (nm in names(sig)) {
    x <- as.data.frame(sig[[nm]])

    cat("\n\n## ", nm, "\n\n", sep = "")
    cat("<p><strong>Number of significant DEGs:</strong> ", nrow(x), "</p>", sep = "")

    if (nrow(x) > 0) {
      show_table(x, n = 30)
    } else {
      cat("<p><em>No significant DEG.</em></p>")
    }
  }

} else {

  x <- as.data.frame(sig)
  cat("<p><strong>Number of significant DEGs:</strong> ", nrow(x), "</p>", sep = "")
  show_table(x, n = 30)
}
```

# GO enrichment {.tabset}

```{r go-tabs, results='asis'}
if (is.null(go)) {

  cat("<p><em>No GO results available.</em></p>")

} else if (is.list(go)) {

  for (nm in names(go)) {
    x <- clean_go(go[[nm]])

    cat("\n\n## ", nm, "\n\n", sep = "")

    if (nrow(x) > 0) {
      show_table(x, n = 30)
    } else {
      cat("<p><em>No enriched GO terms.</em></p>")
    }
  }

} else {

  x <- clean_go(go)
  show_table(x, n = 30)
}
```

# GO plots {.tabset}

## GO plot gallery

```{r go-plots, results='asis'}
go_dirs <- c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_GO"),
  file.path(outdir, "GO"),
  file.path(outdir, "go")
)

go_dir <- go_dirs[dir.exists(go_dirs)][1]
go_files <- find_png(go_dir)

emit_gallery(go_files)
```

# Output files

```{r output-files}
if (dir.exists(outdir)) {
  files <- list.files(outdir, recursive = TRUE, full.names = FALSE)
  files <- files[!grepl("\\.html$", files)]

  show_table(data.frame(file = files), n = 300)
}
```

# Session information

```{r session-info, results='asis'}
session_file <- file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo.txt")

cat("<pre>")

if (file.exists(session_file)) {
  cat(paste(readLines(session_file), collapse = "\n"))
} else {
  print(sessionInfo())
}

cat("</pre>")
```
